summary: Kim Ha-Jin provides Chae Na-Yoon with a powerful, specially-equipped magic sword, significantly boosting her combat potential. Concurrently, an operation to track and recover a target, Cheok Jun-gyeong, aboard an air cargo carrier encounters problems. The mission culminates in a chaotic confrontation where Cheok Jun-gyeong is located, but the unexpected appearance of Rachel further complicates the situation, leading to a tense standoff.
key_moments: Kim Ha-Jin gifts Chae Na-Yoon a magic sword to enhance her power.
An air cargo carrier carrying Cheok Jun-gyeong is tracked, but experiences complications.
Cheok Jun-gyeong is found, but Rachel's unexpected presence creates a tense standoff.
